case_title: LEAH MADDEN VS. THE NAPOLI GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED COMPANY DBA BELDEN TAVERNA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT THE NAPOLI GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BELDEN TAVERNA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY CHECK RECEIVED FROM NAPOLI GROUP, LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT THE NAPOLI GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BELDEN TAVERNA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADDEN, LEAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE NAPOLI GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BELDEN TAVERNA $3,051.25 PRINCIPAL, $6.80 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,258.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT THE NAPOLI GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BELDEN TAVERNA
